# For design improvements

---
name: ⚙️ Mechanical Design Improvement
about: Suggest CAD upgrades or hardware modifications.
title: "[HARDWARE] "
labels: enhancement, hardware
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a physical limitation?**
A description of the hardware bottleneck (e.g., "The current silicone recoater blade shears fine 15µm powder unevenly").

**Proposed Hardware Engineering Solution**
Describe the mechanical modification, material swap, or electronic change needed.

**Impacted Files**
List the CAD paths or BOM indexes this will modify:
- [ ] `/hardware/cad/`
- [ ] `/hardware/bom.md`
